memoryArtifacts.description: When Henry Ferrers was born in 1394 in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, William, was 22 and his mother, Philippa, was 22. He married Isabel de Mowbray and they had five children together. He …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Ferrers於1394年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比時，他的父親William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby22歲，母親Philippa Clifford23歲。他和Isabelle de Mowbray至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1463年12月享年69歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Ferrers于1394年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比时，他的父亲William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby22岁，母亲Philippa Clifford23岁。他和Isabelle de Mowbray至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1463年12月享年69岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Ferrers was born in 1394, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, his father, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, was 22 and his mother, Philippa Clifford, was 23. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Isabelle de Mowbray. He died in December 1463, at the age of 69, and was buried in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Ferrers est né en 1394, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Philippa Clifford, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Isabelle de Mowbray. Il est décédé en décembre 1463, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Ferrers 1394 in Groby, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby 22 und seine Mutter Philippa Clifford 23. Er hatte mit Isabelle de Mowbray mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Dezember 1463 im Alter von 69 Jahren und wurde in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Ferrers è nato il nel 1394 nel Groby, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Clifford, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Isabelle de Mowbray. Morì nel dicembre 1463, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Tamworth, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Ferrersが1394年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで生まれた時，父William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Grobyは22歳，母Philippa Cliffordは23歳であった。彼はIsabelle de Mowbrayとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1463年12月に69歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Ferrers(이)가 1394년 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Clifford(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Isabelle de Mowbray(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1463년 12월 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 타워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Ferrers nasceu em 1394, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Clifford, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Isabelle de Mowbray. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1463, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Ferrers родился в 1394 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Clifford, 23. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Isabelle de Mowbray. Он умер декабрь 1463 г. в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Ferrers nació en 1394, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Philippa Clifford, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Isabelle de Mowbray. Murió en diciembre de 1463, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
